[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010010 2
1 1011000000 3
2 0000000001 1
3 0001000001 2
4 0000010010 2
5 1011000000 3
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 1111110001 7
12 1110000011 5
23 0000101110 4
34 1110110010 6
45 0110110001 5
56 1111100100 6
67 0111110101 7
70 0001001110 4

02 1110001101 6
13 0001010010 3
24 0001100011 4
35 0111111100 7
46 0110101010 5
57 0111101110 7
60 1001000100 3
71 0001000000 1

03 0001011100 4
14 0000011111 5
25 1000101101 5
36 0111100111 7
47 1110100000 4
50 1001011111 7
61 1001001010 4
72 0000111100 4

04 0000010001 2
15 1001010001 4
26 1000110110 5
37 1111101101 8
40 0000010001 2
51 1001010001 4
62 1000110110 5
73 1111101101 8

05 1001011111 7

27 0000111100 4

41 0000011111 5

17 0001000000 1

07 0001001110 4
10 1111110001 7
